hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE '^bun (run )?(apps|libs|mcps)/|^bun run dev:' && echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Do not run packages from root. cd into the package directory first (e.g. cd apps/brain && bun run dev)."}' || echo '{}'

jq -r '.tool_input.content // .tool_input.new_string // ""' | grep -qE 'eslint-disable|@ts-ignore|@ts-expect-error|biome-ignore|@ts-nocheck|noinspection' && echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Do not add lint suppression comments. Fix the underlying type/lint issue instead."}' || echo '{}'

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | grep -qE 'biome\.json$|tsconfig.*\.json$|\.eslintrc' && jq -r '.tool_input.content // .tool_input.new_string // ""' | grep -qE '"off"|"warn"|noUnused.*false|strict.*false' && echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Do not weaken lint rules. Fix the code to satisfy the rule instead."}' || echo '{}'
